summary: Closeout packet for plan_2026_05_05_chat_capture_learn_optimize (verdict: checkpoint_complete). 2 memory candidates.

extracted.text: Memory store uses per-entry markdown with YAML frontmatter, not SQLite
extracted.rationale: Per D4 from chat-capture-learn-optimize plan: memory/<type>/<id>.md with YAML frontmatter is the canonical format. Git-friendly, diffable, human-readable. SQLite layer added only if query patterns demand it later.

extracted.text: Memory telemetry is local-only, configurable disable
extracted.rationale: memory/usage.jsonl is append-only and never transmitted off-device. Disable entirely with MEMORY_TELEMETRY=off env var.

open_gaps: Adversarial review loop applied to memory promotions
Smarter classifier to reduce near-duplicate type matches
